message:
test(bd-2qlj): cover error.rs and duration.rs edge cases

Add 18 new tests covering previously untested paths:
- From<serde_json::Error> conversion
- map_ok for Err/Cancelled/Panicked Outcome variants
- ResultExt for CancelledError (Ok and Err branches)
- McpErrorCode JSON serde roundtrip (all variants)
- McpError JSON deserialization (with and without data)
- masked() preserves ResourceForbidden and PromptNotFound
- is_internal() returns false for ResourceForbidden/PromptNotFound
- McpError Debug/Clone/std::Error trait coverage
- Duration saturating overflow, whitespace-only input, field access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
